title: Automatons
description: This mod pack adds 7 new origins (
body:
Here I added few origins.
The origin named azax is currently not working wery well (need to reload world for (gold, netherite) abilities).
If you want I can try to change it(I guess no one don't care)

There some origin names and their description

aguha:
simple multy-purpose 
unit for every kind 
of work, have bioreactor

mura:
simple scout unit, 
maked for spotting new 
territories and scouting,
have redstone reactor 
and a bit of armor

cagar:
it is a farmer unit, 
have repair field,
better ranged damage, 
and have two 
types of reactors 
(bio, coal)

floc:
perfect miner, was 
created for hard 
work in dangerous 
conditions
have coal reactor

hota:
this is marine by automatons,
can boost yourself using items,
have 3 reactors
(bio, coal, redstone)

azax: (broken one)
this is hightly configurable
machine for various of tasks
have redstone reactor

verkel:
war machine walking tank,
have coal reactor

I tried my best in creating this datapack. But because this is my first one I guess it is pretty low quality.

Any way if you want to try, have fun.
